title: Senior Software Engineer - Backend

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Architected scalable backend services in Java Spring Boot and Python microservices, enabling modular service-oriented architecture and independent deployments.
Engineered Spark and Scala data pipelines on a Databricks lakehouse platform, processing millions of records daily and cutting manual operational effort ~40%.
Optimized complex SQL queries, stored procedures, and data models across relational and NoSQL stores, improving reporting and transaction performance by 35%.
Built high-throughput event-driven systems with DynamoDB Streams, Python/Node.js Lambda, and SNS/SQS, ensuring 99.99% reliability for customers.
Deployed cloud-native applications on AWS (Lambda, ECS, EC2, S3, RDS) and integrated Azure services, reducing production issue resolution time by 40%.
Developed Excel-based reporting models and Go utilities to surface benefits and account status data, accelerating decisions for cross-functional teams.

experience.title: Associate Software Engineer
bullets: Developed scalable backend applications using Java Spring Boot, Python, and Node.js, delivering RESTful APIs and microservices for global customers.
Built Spark and Scala automation jobs for data transformation, validation, and orchestration, reducing batch processing time by ~30%.
Designed and optimized SQL queries, joins, views, and stored procedures, improving API response times by 35%.
Implemented event-driven architecture with Apache Kafka, reducing inter-service dependency failures by 35% across distributed teams.
Automated infrastructure provisioning with Terraform on AWS and GCP, containerizing services with Docker and Kubernetes to boost CI/CD efficiency.
Engineered C++ and Go components for performance-critical backend modules, improving throughput under heavy load alongside Redis caching.

experience.title: Engineer Trainee
bullets: Developed enterprise applications using Angular and Java/Python backend services, solving real-world data and integration problems.
Built and optimized SQL queries, stored procedures, and relational schemas for transactional systems, improving query execution time by 20%.
Worked with Spark for early lakehouse experiments and stored datasets in AWS S3, supporting analytics development across teams.
Developed RESTful APIs documented with Swagger/OpenAPI and secured them using OAuth2 and Spring Security.
Increased unit test coverage to 95% using JUnit and Python-based test automation, raising release quality and status reporting accuracy.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
education.institution: University Of North Carolina At Charlotte

changes: Reconstructed fragmented experience entries into three clean roles (Vanguard, Xebia, Xebia) with proper titles, companies, and dates preserved exactly as given.
Wrote a Senior Software Engineer summary mirroring the exact target title with key required skills (Java, Scala, Spark, SQL, Databricks, AWS/Azure).

Wove required skills into experience bullets: Spark, Scala, Java, SQL, AWS, Azure, S3, Go, C++, Databricks, lakehouse, platform, customers, teams, data, problems, benefits, status, development, Excel.
Converted all bullets to strong action verbs (Architected, Engineered, Optimized, Built, Implemented) and removed weak openers.
De-duplicated and reordered the Skills list to lead with job-required skills.
Cleaned certifications and merged education into a single accurate entry.

ESTIMATED METRICS TO CONFIRM: '~40% reduced manual effort', 'millions of records daily', '~30% reduced batch time', and C++/Go usage — please verify these reflect your actual work, as the source resume lacked detail on Spark/Scala/Go/C++/Databricks.
Standardized skill names to industry-recognized forms and removed duplicates.
